note: PDR 23.7: a vehicle with non-functioning steering must be towed per 23.2(b) = partial-loading method ONLY (not rigid coupling). Correct option = 'Лише способом часткового навантаження' (our idx 4). Stored answer 3 ('жорсткому зчепленні або...') is wrong; rigid coupling not permitted. Confirmed by official rule text + green-way/pomahach/pdr.infotech ticket 5204.
